questions.question: Explain two key benefits of using virtualization templates in data center automation.
expectedPoints: Consistent deployment: Ensures identical configuration across multiple instances
Rapid provisioning: Reduces setup time from hours to minutes
Standardization: Enforces organizational standards and compliance
Reduced errors: Minimizes configuration mistakes through predefined templates

questions.question: Discuss how virtualization enables automated disaster recovery in modern data centers, including at least three specific mechanisms or technologies.
expectedPoints: Snapshot technology: Enpoints point-in-time recovery points
Replication: Continuous data synchronization to secondary sites
Automated failover: Automatic switching to backup systems
Storage virtualization: Abstracted storage enables seamless data mobility
Orchestration platforms: Coordinate complex recovery workflows
Reduced RTO/RPO: Faster recovery times and less data loss
